title: Fake sub-collector: ରାଜଧାନୀରୁ ନକଲି ସବ୍‌କଲେକ୍ଟର ଗିରଫ: ଆଇଏଏସ୍‌ ପରିଚୟ ଦେଇ ଧମକାଉଥିଲା
description:
ଭୁବନେଶ୍ବର: ନିଜକୁ ଆଇଏଏସ୍‌ ବୋଲି ପରିଚୟ ଦେଉଥିଲା। ମଲ୍‌, ସୋରୁମ୍‌ରୁ ଦାମୀ ଜିନିଷ କିଣି ଜାଲ୍‌ ଟ୍ରାଞ୍ଜାକ୍ସନ ଦେଖାଇ ଚୂନ ଲଗାଉଥିଲା। ଏଭଳି ଜଣେ ଜାଲ୍‌ ସବ୍‌କଲେକ୍ଟରକୁ ସହିଦନଗର ଥାନା ପୁଲିସ ଗିରଫ କରିଛି। ସେ ହେଲା ଆନ୍ଧ୍ରପ୍ରଦେଶ ବିଶାଖାପାଟଣମ୍‌ର ବରୋଦା ସୁଧୀର(୨୬)। ତାଠାରୁ ୪୨ ହଜାର ଟଙ୍କା ମୂଲ୍ୟର ଏକ ଦାମୀ ଚଷମା, ମୋବାଇଲ୍‌ ଫୋନ୍‌ ଆଦି ଜବତ କରାଯାଇଛି।
୪୨ ହଜାର ଟଙ୍କିଆ ଚଷମା କିଣି ଦୋକାନୀଙ୍କୁ ଚୂନଆଇଏଏସ୍‌ ପରିଚୟ ଦେଇ ଧମକାଉଥିଲା
ସୂଚନା ମୁତାବକ, ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ସକାଳ ସମୟରେ ସୁଧୀର ସହିଦନଗର ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଥିବା ରେ-ବ୍ୟାନ୍‌ ସୋରୁମ୍‌କୁ ଯାଇଥିଲେ। ସେଠାରେ  ୪୨ ହଜାର ଟଙ୍କା ମୂଲ୍ୟର ଏକ ଚଷମା ନେବା ପାଇଁ ପସନ୍ଦ କରିଥିଲେ। ୟୁପିଆଇ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ପେମେଣ୍ଟ ନକରି ଏନ୍‌ଇଏଫ୍‌ଟି ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଟଙ୍କା ପଠାଇବା ପାଇଁ ସୋରୁମ୍‌ କର୍ମଚାରୀଙ୍କ ସହ ଆଲୋଚନା କରିଥିଲେ। କର୍ମଚାରୀ ଟିକିଏ କୁଣ୍ଠାବୋଧ କରିବାରୁ ବାବୁ ନିଜକୁ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ସବ୍‌କଲେକ୍ଟର ବୋଲି ପରିଚୟ ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ତାଙ୍କ ଚକ୍‌ମକ ବେଶ‌ ପୋଷାକ ସାଙ୍ଗକୁ ଶାଣିତ କଥାବାର୍ତ୍ତା ଦେଖି ତାଙ୍କୁ ଠକ ବୋଲି ଠଉରେଇବା କାଠିକାରପାଠ ଥିଲା। ତେଣୁ କର୍ମଚାରୀ ସୋରୁମ୍‌ ମାଲିକଙ୍କ ସହ କଥାହେବା ପରେ ଆକାଉଣ୍ଟ ନମ୍ବର ‌ଦେଇଥିଲେ। କିଛି ସମୟ ପରେ ବାବୁ ଜଣଙ୍କ ଏନ୍‌ଇଏଫ୍‌ଟି ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଟଙ୍କା ପଠାଇଥିବା ସ୍କ୍ରିନ୍‌ସଟ୍‌ ଦେଖାଇଥିଲେ। କର୍ମଚାରୀ ଆକାଉଣ୍ଟ ଯାଞ୍ଚ  ବେଳେ ଆକାଉଣ୍ଟକୁ ଟଙ୍କା ଆସି ନଥିବାରୁ ଚଷମା ଦେବାକୁ ମନା କରିଥିଲେ। ମୁଁ ସବ୍‌-କଲେକ୍ଟର ଅଛି, ଟଙ୍କା ପଠାଇବା ପରେ ମୋତେ ତୁମେମାନେ ପାଠ ପଢ଼ାଉଛ। ତମକୁ ଏତିକି ଜଣାନାହିଁ? ଏନ୍‌ଇଏଫ୍‌ଟିରେ ଟଙ୍କା ପଠାଗଲା ଆକାଉଣ୍ଟକୁ କ୍ରେଡିଟ୍‌ ହେବା ପାଇଁ ଅତିକମ୍‌ରେ ୩୦ ମିନିଟ୍‌ରୁ ଏକ ଘଣ୍ଟା ସମୟ ଲାଗେ। ସବ୍‌କଲେକ୍ଟର ବାବୁଙ୍କ ନାଲିଆଖି ଦେଖି କର୍ମଚାରୀ ଡରିଯାଇଥିଲେ।
Agriculture: ଆଧୁନିକତାରେ ହଜିଯାଉଛି ହଳ-ଲଙ୍ଗଳ
ବିଶ୍ବାସ କରି ବାବୁଙ୍କ ମୋବାଇଲ୍‌ ନମ୍ବର ଏବଂ ତଥ୍ୟ ରଖି ଚଷମା ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ଆକାଉଣ୍ଟକୁ ଟଙ୍କା ଆସିବାରେ ବିଳମ୍ବ ହେବାରୁ କର୍ମଚାରୀମାନେ ସବ୍‌କଲେକ୍ଟରଙ୍କୁ ବାରମ୍ବାର ଫୋନ୍‌ କରିଥିଲେ। ହେଲେ ନା ସେ ଫୋନ୍‌ କଲ୍‌ର ଜବାବ ଦେଇଥିଲେ ନା ନିଜଆଡ଼ୁ କଲ୍‌ କରିଥିଲେ। ସନ୍ଦେହ ହେବାରୁ ସୋରୁମ୍‌ର ଶ୍ରୀନିବାସ ପାତ୍ର ସହିଦନଗର ଥାନାରେ ଅଭିଯୋଗ କରିଥିଲେ। ଏନେଇ ପୁଲିସ ଏକ ମାମଲା ରୁଜୁକରି ଘଟଣାର ତଦନ୍ତ ଜାରି ରଖିଥିଲା। ନମ୍ବର ଟ୍ରାକିଂ ବେଳେ ସୁଧୀର ରାଜମହଲ ଛକ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଥିବା ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଥିଲା। ଏହାପରେ ପୁଲିସର ଏକ ଟିମ୍‌ ସେଠାରେ ଚଢ଼ଉ କରି ତାଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରିବା ସହ ଚଷମା ଏବଂ ମୋବାଇଲ୍‌ ଜବତ କରିଥିଲା। ଥାନାକୁ ଆଣି ଜେରା ପରେ ସେ ଠକେଇ ନେଇ ସବୁ ସତ ଓଗାଳିଥିଲା। ଜେରା ପରେ ଆଜି ତାକୁ କୋର୍ଟ ଚାଲାଣ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଅନ୍ୟପଟେ ବାବୁ ଜଣଙ୍କ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ମଧ୍ୟ ଏକାଧିକ ସ୍ଥାନରୁ ଏଭଳି ଠକେଇ କରିଥିବା ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି। ପୂର୍ବରୁ ତାଙ୍କ ନାଁରେ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ରଶେଖରପୁର, ଖାରବେଳନଗର, ପାରାଦ୍ବୀପ, ତିର୍ତ୍ତୋଲ ଆଦି ଥାନାରେ ଠକେଇ ମାମଲା ଥିବା  ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି।

title: Zach Lowe has doubts about the future of Jaylen Brown with the Boston Celtics
description: "It feels like the toothpaste is too far out of the tube with Jaylen Brown," said Lowe.
content: If you ask a dozen NBA analysts what they think will happen with star Celtics forward Jaylen Brown after the team's failed attempt to trade for Milwaukee Bucks star big man Giannis Antetokounmpo, and you might get as many takes as to the specifics of the Georgia native's future. But there appears to be a sizable subset of those analysts who increasingly believe that Brown will be suiting up for another ball club by the start of the 2026-27 NBA regular season.And we can count among them Ringer podcast host and league analyst Zach Lowe among them. On a recent episode of his eponymous "Zach Lowe Show," the esteemed analyst shared his point of view on the Brown situation."It feels like the toothpaste is too far out of the tube with Jaylen Brown," said Lowe with regard to Celtics President of Basketball Operations President of Basketball Operations and company dangling the Cal alum for the Greek Freak."If you ask me right now," said Lowe, "I don't think Jaylen Brown starts the season with the Boston Celtics next year.""That could end up being wrong. I'm not saying that definitively, I'm saying if you made me bet, yes or no, is Jaylen Brown a Celtic next year, I'm betting no."Listen to "Havlicek Stole the Pod" on:Blue Wire: https://tiny.ee/CdKpiTunes: https://tiny.ee/RK47YouTube: https://tiny.ee/cOW3This article originally appeared on Celtics Wire: Zach Lowe has doubts about the future of Jaylen Brown with the Boston Celtics

title: John Deere Classic field features Keegan Bradley, Rickie Fowler, Jordan Spieth
description: After a run of majors and signature events, the PGA Tour turns to one of its grassroots events, the John Deere Classic.
content: After a run of majors and signature events, the PGA Tour turns to one of its grassroots events, the John Deere Classic.The JDC is held annually at TPC Deere Run in Silvis, Illinois, with this year marking the 26th time hosting. This is also the 28th year that John Deere is the sponsor, second longest on the circuit.The field for the tournament was announced Friday afternoon. Defending champion Brian Campbell is joined by a list of notables that includes Daniel Berger, Keegan Bradley, Blades Brown, Eric Cole, Tony Finau, Rickie Fowler, Chris Gotterup, Harry Higgs, Max Homa, Tom Kim, Keith Mitchell and Jordan Spieth. There will be 144 players on the tee sheet when the first round starts on Thursday, July 2.John Deere is the PGA TOUR’s second-longest running title sponsor (1998), behind only AT&T (1986/AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am).  John Deere Classic field: pic.twitter.com/k86xDLnWJw— PGA TOUR Communications (@PGATOURComms) June 26, 2026TPC Deere Run will play as a par 71 and measure 7,289 yards.This article originally appeared on Golfweek: John Deere Classic field features Keegan Bradley, Rickie Fowler, Jordan Spieth

title: Washington Football Beats Out Arizona For Top 2027 Long Snapper
description: The Washington Huskies added another commitment from Sandra Day O'Connor High School in Arizona on Thursday.
content: The Washington Huskies snagged another verbal commitment from Sandra Day O'Connor High School for its 2027 recruiting class on Thursday with the addition of long snapper Braylon Logan.Listed at 6-foot-2 and 240 pounds, Logan hails from the same high school as four-star running back commit Jeremy Adeyanju, in Arizona, and ultimately chose Jedd Fisch, special teams coordinator Chris Petrilli, and the Huskies over an offer from the in-state Wildcats."1000 percent committed to UW football," Logan wrote in a post on social media to announce his decision. "(Special teams coordinator Chris) Petrilli and Brett Arkelian, thank you for this amazing opportunity. January can't come soon enough. I'm truly blessed for all the people God has placed in my life to get me this far."Of importance, Logan's acknowledgement of January indicates the specialist will enroll for the winter quarter after the 2026 college football season, which will give the program at least a pair of young long snappers to head into the following spring, unlike this past April.1000% Commited to @UW_Football! @CoachPetrilli and @IcemanCoaching, thank you for this amazing opportunity. January can’t come soon enough! I’m truly blessed for all the people God has placed in my life to get me this far. #GoDAWGS#Blessed#AZEliteSnap@steverausch17… pic.twitter.com/m7KNNl08JL— Braylon Logan (@Braylon_Logan) June 25, 2026Former IMG Academy long snapper Ben Ferber joined the program this summer to join senior Ryan Kean, a valued transfer addition from Utah State prior to last season. Former freshman walk-on Hunter Solwold opted to transfer to Florida, which resulted in UW being short-handed for spring practices.Logan is ranked as the No. 1 long snapper in the Grand Canyon State and No. 3 in the country, per Kohl's Kicking. "Logan is the most consistent Snapper in the country," Kohl's Kicking wrote in an evaluation. "He simply doesn’t miss his target and has tight rotation on each ball. Logan has one of the smoothest and most repeatable snapping motions I have ever seen from a high school snapper. He was dominant during the 2026 Kohl’s Spring Western Showcase, finishing tied for the highest overall charting score in the country and an average snap time of .68 seconds. Logan checks every box a college coach is looking for and has the talent to start at the Power 4 level."With Kean having played three seasons at Utah Tech and two seasons at UW after this coming fall, Petrilli and Arkelian will likely also look to add another snapper through the transfer portal to support and compete with the two underclassmen, Ferber and Logan, come next year. This article originally appeared on Huskies Wire: Washington Football Beats Out Arizona For Top 2027 Long Snapper

title: New Zealand vs. Belgium free live stream: How to watch World Cup game online without cable
description: Here's everything you need to know to watch the New Zealand vs. Belgium World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.
content:
New Zealand vs. Belgium free live stream: How to watch World Cup game online without cable originally appeared on The Sporting News.
                Add The Sporting News as a Preferred Source by clicking here.Belgium and New Zealand face off in a crucial Group G match. Both sides have little to lose if they want to get out of the group stage.The Red Devils arrive at their 15th World Cup, a tournament tradition matched by few nations, and check in 10th in the latest FIFA rankings. Kevin De Bruyne is the man to watch in midfield, while Romelu Lukaku and Jeremy Doku give Belgium as much firepower up top as any of the top countries.That track record didn't translate to results in Qatar four years ago, when Belgium crashed out in the group stage, finishing behind both Morocco and Croatia in a campaign few in Brussels care to remember.New Zealand, ranked 85th in the world, is making just its third trip to the World Cup, with previous appearances dating back to 1982 and 2010.Chris Wood remains the face of the program, and he'll lean on Marko Stamenic and Matt Garbett as the All-Whites try to make some noise against one of the tournament's heavyweights.Here's everything you need to know to watch the New Zealand vs. Belgium World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.New Zealand vs. Belgium free live streamThis game is available to stream for FREE on fubo.Fubo offers a free trial for new subscribers, so you can try the service before you buy. Stream ESPN, ABC, CBS, Fox and 100+ top channels of live TV and sports without cable. (Participating plans only. Taxes and fees may apply.)New Zealand vs. Belgium channel, live streamTV channel: FOXStreaming: fubo, Fox One, Fox Sports app/websiteNew Zealand vs. Belgium will be broadcast on FOX in the United States with streaming options available on its dedicated platforms.The best place to catch the match is on streaming service fubo, with new customers able to sign up for a FREE trial.What time does New Zealand vs. Belgium kick off?New Zealand vs. Belgium kicks off Friday, June 26, at 11 p.m. ET at BC Place in Vancouver, Canada.Here's how that time translates across the United States timezones:DateKickoff timeEastern TimeFriday, June 2611 p.m.Central TimeFriday, June 2610 p.m.Mountain TimeFriday, June 269 p.m.Pacific TimeFriday, June 268 p.m.New Zealand vs. Belgium betting oddsWorld Cup schedule today and tomorrowAll times Eastern.Friday, June 26France vs. Norway (3 p.m.)Senegal vs. Iraq (3 p.m.)Spain vs. Uruguay (8 p.m.)Cape Verde vs. Saudi Arabia (8 p.m.)New Zealand vs. Belgium (11 p.m.)Egypt vs. Iran (11 p.m.)Saturday, June 27Panama vs. England (5 p.m.)Croatia vs. Ghana (5 p.m.)Colombia vs. Portugal (7:30 p.m.)DR Congo vs. Uzbekistan (7:30 p.m.)Jordan vs. Argentina (10 p.m.)Algeria vs. Austria (10 p.m.)MORE:Complete World Cup schedule and fixtures2026 FIFA World Cup FAQsWhen is the 2026 FIFA World Cup?The 2026 FIFA World Cup is scheduled to run from June 11 through July 19, 2026. It will be the first World Cup hosted across three countries: the United States, Canada and Mexico.Where is the 2026 FIFA World Cup being played?The 2026 World Cup will be played across 16 host cities in North America, with matches taking place in the United States, Canada and Mexico. It will be the first men’s World Cup hosted by three countries.The 16 host cities are Atlanta, Boston, Dallas, Houston, Kansas City, Los Angeles, Miami, New York/New Jersey, Philadelphia, San Francisco and Seattle in the United States; Toronto and Vancouver in Canada; and Guadalajara, Mexico City and Monterrey in Mexico.How many teams are in the 2026 World Cup?The 2026 FIFA World Cup will feature 48 teams, expanding from the 32-team format used in previous tournaments. The larger field also means more matches, more knockout-round games and more countries involved than ever before.The 48 teams are Algeria, Argentina, Australia, Austria, Belgium, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Brazil, Cape Verde, Canada, Colombia, Croatia, Curaçao, Czechia, DR Congo, Ecuador, Egypt, England, France, Germany, Ghana, Haiti, Iran, Iraq, Ivory Coast, Japan, Jordan, Mexico, Morocco, Netherlands, New Zealand, Norway, Panama, Paraguay, Portugal, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Scotland, Senegal, South Africa, South Korea, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, Tunisia, Türkiye, United States, Uruguay and Uzbekistan.How many games are in the 2026 World Cup?There will be 104 matches at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. That includes the group stage, knockout rounds and the final.Can I stream the 2026 World Cup?Yes. Streaming options will depend on the match, language and broadcast partner. In the U.S., Fox Sports lists FOX and FS1, which are available on fubo for English-language coverage, while Telemundo will stream every match live on Peacock and the Telemundo App for Spanish-language coverage.What channel is the 2026 World Cup on?In the U.S., English-language matches are expected across FOX and FS1, which are available on fubo for those without cable, while Spanish-language coverage will air on Telemundo and Universo, which you can stream on DIRECTV and Peacock. Check the schedule for the specific match you want to watch.When is the 2026 World Cup final?The 2026 FIFA World Cup final is scheduled for Sunday, July 19, 2026. The match will be played at New York-New Jersey Stadium, FIFA’s tournament name for MetLife Stadium.What time do World Cup games start?Kickoff times vary by date, host city and round. Because the tournament is being played across multiple time zones in the United States, Canada and Mexico, fans should check the official match schedule for start times in their local time zone.Is the United States playing in the 2026 World Cup?Yes. The United States automatically qualified for the 2026 World Cup as one of the three host nations, along with Canada and Mexico.

title: Egypt vs. Iran free live stream: How to watch World Cup game online without cable
description: Here's everything you need to know to watch the Egypt vs. Iran World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.
content:
Egypt vs. Iran free live stream: How to watch World Cup game online without cable originally appeared on The Sporting News.
                Add The Sporting News as a Preferred Source by clicking here.The battle for Group G supremacy pits the top two teams against each other when Egypt and Iran meet in a match that could go a long way toward deciding who advances to the knockout round.Egypt comes in riding high after a 3-1 win over New Zealand, having opened the tournament with a 1-1 draw against Belgium. Mohamed Salah got on the scoresheet against the All-Whites and remains the engine of an attack that also features Omar Marmoush, Trézéguet, Nantes' Mostafa Mohamed and Emam Ashour.The Pharaohs are making their fourth World Cup appearance but have never escaped the group stage, making this moment as significant as any in the program's history.Iran has gone 0-1-1 through two matches, drawing 2-2 with New Zealand and playing to a scoreless stalemate against Belgium, leaving them needing something out of this fixture to stay alive. Sardar Azmoun and Mehdi Taremi are the players Iran will look to in the big moments.The Iranians are no strangers to this stage, appearing in seven World Cups, including four straight. But, like Egypt, they've never found a way through to the next round.Here's everything you need to know to watch the Egypt vs. Iran World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.Egypt vs. Iran free live streamThis game is available to stream for FREE on fubo.Fubo offers a free trial for new subscribers, so you can try the service before you buy. Stream ESPN, ABC, CBS, Fox and 100+ top channels of live TV and sports without cable. (Participating plans only. Taxes and fees may apply.)Egypt vs. Iran channel, live streamTV channel: FS1Streaming: fubo, Fox One, Fox Sports app/websiteEgypt vs. Iran will be broadcast on FS1 in the United States with streaming options available on its dedicated platforms.The best place to catch the match is on streaming service fubo, with new customers able to sign up for a FREE trial.What time does Egypt vs. Iran kick off?Egypt vs. Iran kicks off Friday, June 26, at 11 p.m. ET at Lumen Field in Seattle, Washington.Here's how that time translates across the United States timezones:DateKickoff timeEastern TimeFriday, June 2611 p.m.Central TimeFriday, June 2610 p.m.Mountain TimeFriday, June 269 p.m.Pacific TimeFriday, June 268 p.m.Egypt vs. Iran betting oddsWorld Cup schedule today and tomorrowAll times Eastern.Friday, June 26France vs. Norway (3 p.m.)Senegal vs. Iraq (3 p.m.)Spain vs. Uruguay (8 p.m.)Cape Verde vs. Saudi Arabia (8 p.m.)New Zealand vs. Belgium (11 p.m.)Egypt vs. Iran (11 p.m.)Saturday, June 27Panama vs. England (5 p.m.)Croatia vs. Ghana (5 p.m.)Colombia vs. Portugal (7:30 p.m.)DR Congo vs. Uzbekistan (7:30 p.m.)Jordan vs. Argentina (10 p.m.)Algeria vs. Austria (10 p.m.)MORE:Complete World Cup schedule and fixtures2026 FIFA World Cup FAQsWhen is the 2026 FIFA World Cup?The 2026 FIFA World Cup is scheduled to run from June 11 through July 19, 2026. It will be the first World Cup hosted across three countries: the United States, Canada and Mexico.Where is the 2026 FIFA World Cup being played?The 2026 World Cup will be played across 16 host cities in North America, with matches taking place in the United States, Canada and Mexico. It will be the first men’s World Cup hosted by three countries.The 16 host cities are Atlanta, Boston, Dallas, Houston, Kansas City, Los Angeles, Miami, New York/New Jersey, Philadelphia, San Francisco and Seattle in the United States; Toronto and Vancouver in Canada; and Guadalajara, Mexico City and Monterrey in Mexico.How many teams are in the 2026 World Cup?The 2026 FIFA World Cup will feature 48 teams, expanding from the 32-team format used in previous tournaments. The larger field also means more matches, more knockout-round games and more countries involved than ever before.The 48 teams are Algeria, Argentina, Australia, Austria, Belgium, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Brazil, Cape Verde, Canada, Colombia, Croatia, Curaçao, Czechia, DR Congo, Ecuador, Egypt, England, France, Germany, Ghana, Haiti, Iran, Iraq, Ivory Coast, Japan, Jordan, Mexico, Morocco, Netherlands, New Zealand, Norway, Panama, Paraguay, Portugal, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Scotland, Senegal, South Africa, South Korea, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, Tunisia, Türkiye, United States, Uruguay and Uzbekistan.How many games are in the 2026 World Cup?There will be 104 matches at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. That includes the group stage, knockout rounds and the final.Can I stream the 2026 World Cup?Yes. Streaming options will depend on the match, language and broadcast partner. In the U.S., Fox Sports lists FOX and FS1, which are available on fubo for English-language coverage, while Telemundo will stream every match live on Peacock and the Telemundo App for Spanish-language coverage.What channel is the 2026 World Cup on?In the U.S., English-language matches are expected across FOX and FS1, which are available on fubo for those without cable, while Spanish-language coverage will air on Telemundo and Universo, which you can stream on DIRECTV and Peacock. Check the schedule for the specific match you want to watch.When is the 2026 World Cup final?The 2026 FIFA World Cup final is scheduled for Sunday, July 19, 2026. The match will be played at New York-New Jersey Stadium, FIFA’s tournament name for MetLife Stadium.What time do World Cup games start?Kickoff times vary by date, host city and round. Because the tournament is being played across multiple time zones in the United States, Canada and Mexico, fans should check the official match schedule for start times in their local time zone.Is the United States playing in the 2026 World Cup?Yes. The United States automatically qualified for the 2026 World Cup as one of the three host nations, along with Canada and Mexico.

title: Video! UFC’s Dana White Will Never Fire ‘Loyal’ Joe Rogan
description: Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) CEO, Dana White, is extremely loyal to those who helped grow the promotion from the ground up and this includes long-time color commentator, Joe Rogan. It’s no secret that Rogan has been one of the most recognizable voices in mixed martial arts (MMA) over the past 20 years. While Rogan is […]
content: WASHINGTON, DC - JUNE 13: (L-R) Joe Rogan and UFC President and CEO Dana White speak onstage during the UFC Freedom 250 ceremonial weigh-in at The Ellipse on June 13, 2026 in Washington, DC. (Photo by Ed Mulholland/Zuffa LLC)	Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) CEO, Dana White, is extremely loyal to those who helped grow the promotion from the ground up and this includes long-time color commentator, Joe Rogan.It’s no secret that Rogan has been one of the most recognizable voices in mixed martial arts (MMA) over the past 20 years. While Rogan is just as popular in the world of podcasts he has a special connection to UFC and fight fans. He’s been part of the promotion from the early days and White holds Rogan in the highest regard because of it.That said, Rogan is not perfect. The outspoken comedian and podcast host has said some fairly controversial things over the years, including discussions about politics and vaccinations. This has caused some backlash over the years and has even resulted in some powerful people reaching out to White in effort to get Rogan fired.Unfortunately for them, White will never part ways with Rogan and is ready to go to battle with anyone asking him to.Dana White reveals people with money tried to get Joe Rogan fired“In Rogan’s rise, he’s gone through some stuff personally too. I’ve had people call and say you gotta do this to Rogan”“I’m like, don’t ever call me. Who the hell are you to call me and tell me who I’m going to… pic.twitter.com/M5yprQrUZL— katsu (@katsuxbt) June 26, 2026“In Rogan’s rise, he’s gone through some stuff personally too. I’ve had people call and say you gotta do this to Rogan,” said White in a recent interview (shown above).“I’m like, don’t ever call me. Who the hell are you to call me and tell me who I’m going to fire?“Joe Rogan did the first 12 fights for us for free. When we bought this company, the only two who were any good on radio were me and Joe Rogan, but nobody knew who I was. We’d get up at 3:00 in the morning, get dropped into East Coast markets, and do the same interviews over and over. Rogan and I did this for years.“He’s been a key, instrumental part of this company. And for anybody, I don’t give a damn how much money you have, or sponsor, or whatever. Nothing’s happening to Joe Rogan. “Loyalty. It’s the most important thing in the world to me.”

title: ‘The league just doesn’t care’: Chicago sports fan goes to the bar. Then he realizes the NFL has screwed over bars now there’s no NFL Sunday Ticket
description: "They know exactly what they are doing."
content: Every gameday during the NFL season, millions of fans head to their local sports bar to watch their team. Football season brings big money to the staff and owners of these establishments. Some rely on it to survive.A recent change by the NFL has some accusing the league of putting those livelihoods at stake.Dante Deiana (@barstooldonte), a DJ and Barstool Sports writer based in Chicago, recently went off on the NFL’s streaming pivot and its punishing effect on sports bars across the country. And the receipts mostly check out.In a viral TikTok, Deiana explains what he calls a raw deal for bar owners heading into the 2026 NFL season.“There’s only one legal way to do it now, and it’s through one company called EverPass,” he said. “There’s no more DirecTV; there’s no backup, no shopping around.”He’s mostly right. The NFL and DirecTV, which carried the package for over three decades, couldn’t reach a renewal deal. So now EverPass Media, co-owned by the NFL’s venture capital arm, 32 Equity, and RedBird Capital, is now the sole authorized commercial distributor of NFL Sunday Ticket.Deiana cited a Texas bar owner who testified before Congress that a single commercial video switch costs $15,000, with full upgrades running $30,000 to $40,000 per venue.Jim Hallers, founder of Tailgators Pub & Grill and Citizens Grill in Houston, Texas, told the House Judiciary Committee on June 10 that bars can’t simply swap 40 satellite boxes for 40 streaming devices. “The internet capacity, hardware, control systems, and reliability are not there yet,” Hallers testified.NFL games cost big moneyWhere Deiana gets a little loose is calling the NFL “110 billion dollar league.”That figure refers to the league’s 11-year media rights package — not its valuation or annual revenue, which sits around $23 billion.He also characterized NFL Commissioner Roger Goodell’s absence from the hearing as a “no call, no show.” Goodell actually formally declined through NFL general counsel, citing ongoing Sunday Ticket antitrust litigation. Nobody from the league showed up or responded afterward — but it was a communicated refusal, not a ghosting.His claim that the Department of Justice and Federal Communications Commission are investigating is true.The DOJ opened an antitrust probe in April. The FCC is also actively reviewing whether sports leagues should continue to benefit from antitrust exemptions under the Sports Broadcasting Act of 1961.“I am a die-hard fan”People sided firmly with Deiana in the comments.“They are a billion-dollar business, they know exactly what they are doing,” said one commenter. “The NFL is awful now. The costs are ridiculous. I am a die-hard fan, and now I am considering my fandom. You are correct they don’t give a s*** about the fans.”Another person said they were glad Deiana spoke up and explained how the constellation of streamers has changed everything for fans of all sports, not just football.“I’m glad someone is finally talking about this,” they wrote. “My family and I are big hockey fans and this Stanley Cup season, the NHL would switch which streaming service would livestream the games. So one night you’d have to pay for Hulu, while the next night you’d have to pay for ESPN, and some nights it would only be on HBO Max. It’s all getting out of hand.”The hidden costs of streaming the NFLDuring his testimony, Hallers told Congress that the transition isn’t just about cost. It’s literally everything required to run a business. “It is one thing to stream a game at home,” he said. “It is another thing to stream 10 noon games at once while also running point-of-sale systems, credit card processing, security cameras, online ordering, music, office systems, and customer Wi-Fi.”The pressure extends well beyond bar owners.FCC Commissioner Anna Gomez testified at the same hearing that the economics of watching sports have fundamentally changed.“What used to arrive through an antenna, available to anyone regardless of income, has increasingly migrated behind a growing stack of subscriptions and league-specific apps,” Gomez said. “For a family trying to follow their team through a full season, the cost of piecing together access across multiple platforms adds up quickly.”The Big Lead reached out to Deiana, the FCC, and the NFL via email for more information.

title: 27-fight UFC vet Joe Lauzon signs with BKFC, set for debut at Fenway Park
description: Joe Lauzon is taking the gloves off for his return fight
content: BOSTON, MASSACHUSETTS - OCTOBER 18: Joe Lauzon reacts after his TKO victory over Jonathan Pearce in their lightweight bout during the UFC Fight Night event at TD Garden on October 18, 2019 in Boston, Massachusetts. (Photo by Chris Unger/Zuffa LLC via Getty Images) | Zuffa LLC via Getty Images	Joe Lauzon is fighting in Boston again, this time at the most historic ballpark in Major League Baseball. Promotional officials announced on Friday that Lauzon, a veteran of 27 UFC fights, has signed a multi-fight deal with BKFC. The Massachusetts native debuts at BKFC 92 on Aug. 29 at Fenway Park.“The thing that got me really excited was fighting at Fenway Park,” Lauzon said in a relase. “I’ve fought in Boston before and I fought at TD Garden, but there’s something special about competing on the field at Fenway. I grew up a Red Sox fan, played baseball as a kid, and watched the Red Sox win the World Series while I was in college. To have the chance to fight there is pretty incredible.“Boston has always shown up for me. Every time I’ve fought there, my friends, family, and supporters have packed the building. I can’t wait to experience that again. There aren’t many venues more iconic than Fenway Park. Getting to fight there is something I’ll remember forever.”An opponent for Lauzon will be announced at a later date.Lauzon hasn’t competed in a combat sports bout in nearly seven years, picking up a 93 second TKO win over Jonathan Pearce at UFC Boston in October 2019. Lauzon was booked to fight Donald Cerrone on three separate occasions following that bout, but all of them fell through for a variety of reasons. The 42-year-old competed on season five of The Ultimate Fighter, but has one of the most memorable octagon debuts in UFC history with a short-notice, 48 second knockout of former lightweight champ Jens Pulver at UFC 63 in September 2006.

title: Fire Near Tri-Cities, Washington, Behind Smoke Seen In Kennewick; Evacuation Alert Issued
description: Smoke from the Klickitat County wildfire has reached the Tri-Cities area in Washington State as emergency officials issue Level 3 "GO NOW" and Level 2 "GET SET" evacuation notices for the affected area.
content: Smoke from the wildfire burning in Klickitat County's Alderdale area has spread into the Tri-Cities area in Washington State, reducing air quality in the region. Emergency officials have issued Level 3 "GO NOW" and Level 2 "GET SET" evacuation alerts for residents in the affected areas.

title: UTEP celebrates move to Mountain West ahead of July 1 debut
description: On the eve of its move to the Mountain West Conference, UTEP rejoiced that it is heading home.
content: UTEP’s celebration and pep rally in anticipation of its impending July 1 move to the Mountain West Conference was all about a look to the future, and much of that excitement had to do with a nostalgic past.Technically, the Mountain West is new ground for the UTEP athletic programs, but returning to places like New Mexico, Wyoming, Air Force and Hawaii isn’t untrodden ground.More: UTEP set for Mountain West Conference move, leaving Conference USA after 20 years”Entering the Mountain West Conference on July 1 feels good, it feels right, it’s where UTEP belongs,” voice of the Miners John Teischer told a crowd of 200 that included donors, coaches, student-athletes and virtually every local media outlet. “It’s home. It’s home. The Mountain West Conference is home.”It is more than just a historic event for UTEP athletics. It is the fulfillment of a longtime dream for the most ardent Miner supporters.“That dream began as a nightmare in 1999 when UTEP’s historic rivals, its “home,” broke away from the Western Athletic Conference to form the Mountain West and left the Miners behind.More: The Pac-12 is raiding the Mountain West. What does that mean for UTEP sports?Since that dark day, UTEP fans have longed for a chance to set its sights West, and that day arrives July 1. Friday’s event at the Durham Center was a celebration of the work and the journey that led to it.“Ever since I was named director of athletics in 2019 … I had 50 town hall meetings in the first five or six months. I was here all over the city, and the number 1 thing I heard from people was, ‘When are you going to get us in the Mountain West?,” athletic director Jim Senter said.”Some have waited 28 years for us to join the Mountain West. We’ll, we’re here. This is good for UTEP and it’s good for El Paso.”There was excitement everywhere as UTEP announced a new phase of its Mountain West-themed fundraising initiative, as its “Climb Higher” campaign is moving to a “Reach the Peak” phase, kick-started by a $2.5 million pledge from Paul Foster and Alejandra de la Vega-Foster, announced at the event.Senter then put that in perspective.”We’re in the resource fight of our lives if we want to have a viable athletic department and program,” Senter said. “As we continue to go about and talk to people and they said, ‘What do you need?’ We need to get people involved.”Do what you can do.”The feeling is that it will be an easier ask in the Mountain West Conference, and UTEP began that celebration five days early.Bret Bloomquist can be reached at bbloomquist@elpasotimes.com; @Bretbloomquist on X.This article originally appeared on El Paso Times: UTEP celebrates move to Mountain West ahead of July 1 debut

title: Do the Boston Celtics have a high asking price for Jaylen Brown?
description: How much are the Boston Celtics asking for, in return for Jaylen Brown
content: If the Boston Celtics are going to trade Jaylen Brown this summer, it won't be for pennies on the dollar. Brad Stevens has reportedly been entertaining discussions surrounding the All-Star forward, following Boston's inability to get a deal for Giannis Antetokounmpo over the line. Brown is coming off a career year. In 71 regular-season games, he averaged 28.7 points, 6.9 rebounds and 5.1 assists, shooting 34.7 percent from deep and 52.3 percent from two-point range. There will never be a better time to try and cash in on Brown than right now. During a recent episode of the "Anything Is Poddable" podcast, hosts Jay King and Brian Robb revealed that, despite Boston's openness to trading Brown, President of Basketball Operations Brad Stevens has slapped a hefty price tag on him. They also discussed potential trade rumors, and how the LaMelo Ball deal gives some insight into what Brad Stevens is asking for in a deal for Brown.You can watch the full podcast by clicking on the embedded video above.Watch or listen to the "Celtics Chronicle" podcast on:YouTube: https://bit.ly/3QnlPcSSpotify: https://bit.ly/40JRevfApple: https://apple.co/45sAUBGSubstack: https://bit.ly/3WoA0CfThis article originally appeared on Celtics Wire: Do the Boston Celtics have a high asking price for Jaylen Brown?

title: Sivo spree continues as leaders Leeds maul Hull KR
description: Free-scoring Maika Sivo takes his tally of Super League tries to 27 for the season with two in Leeds' emphatic victory against champions Hull KR.
content: Betfred Super LeagueLeeds (18) 34Tries: Hankinson, Sivo 2, Connor, Handley Goals: Connor 7Hull KR (2) 8Tries: Booth Goals: Martin 2Free-scoring Maika Sivo took his tally of Super League tries to 27 for the season with two in Leeds Rhinos' emphatic 34-8 victory against champions Hull KR at Headingley.Sivo touched down either side of the break to make it 15 tries in an unbroken nine-game scoring spree from the Fiji winger as the table-topping Rhinos moved two points clear at the summit.Chris Hankinson had gone over for Leeds' first try of the night, while Jake Connor landed two of his three first-half penalties before Sivo went over for the first time.Sivo then added to Rhinos' 18-2 half-time lead against a Robins side that had Rhyse Martin in the sin-bin.And while Noah Booth hit back with a try soon after, Connor went over for a fourth Leeds try before the hour mark before Ash Handley completed the win.Hull KR's crushing defeat came just three days after it was confirmed Nathan Cayless will be the man to replace all-conquering head coach Willie Peters when he leaves the Robins for National Rugby League expansion club Papua New Guinea Chiefs at the end of the season.For Leeds, a fifth successive win was also another statement victory after they beat Warrington Wolves 34-6 in a top-of-the-table showdown a week earlier.There were emotional pre-match scenes at Headingley for what was Leeds' annual Motor Neurone Disease (MND) Awareness game, with tributes paid to the late Rob Burrow - the Rhinos legend who died with the disease in 2024, aged 41.Once the game kicked off, Hull KR showed ferocious intent against the competition pacesetters, who delivered a high-profile 58-6 thrashing of the Robins in Las Vegas in March.So intense were the opening exchanges that the Robins pair of Tom Amone and Dean Hadley left each other with bloodied faces after clashing heads.While Amone was able to return with bandages wrapped around his face, Hadley failed his head injury assessment and will now also miss next week's derby showdown against Hull FC at Magic Weekend.That adds to Hull KR's list of injury woes, which grew for this game with Joe Burgess, Sauaso Sue and Sam Luckley missing out.After Connor traded penalties with Martin in a tense opening 30 minutes, the half-back threaded a grubber kick for Hankinson to pounce on for the game's first try.Sivo dotted down twice after that as Leeds quickly looked as if they would cruise to another big win against the Robins.Booth's try came as little consolation as Connor capped a stunning performance with a four-pointer of his own before Handley went over for a try that earned him his 500th Super League point.Praise for 'brave' Leeds and 'pride' in beaten Robins - reactionLeeds Rhinos head coach Brad Arthur speaking to BBC Radio Leeds:"We pushed, right from the start of the week, about being brave - for the MND round, for Rob [Burrow] and his family. And I thought we were extremely brave tonight."We talked about being brave in the collision, and I thought we dominated that area. They came after us hard early and got stuck into us. We withstood it and pushed through the other side, so I was really happy with that part of our game."We have probably done a couple of dumb things here and there, but it makes us exciting to watch and hard to defend against - so I have to live with a little bit of it."I still think we have plenty left in us to improve and that was a bit of the discussion straight away after the game. But we have just got to be happy that it was a nice strong win against a very good team."Hull KR head coach Willie Peters told BBC Radio Humberside:"We had to handle some adversity at the start, obviously having two front rowers coming off didn't help. But I was happy with how we started - we started with intent and we were physical."It might sound weird, but I was really proud of them for large periods of that game. We were playing against the best in the comp at the moment, and for large parts we held our own."But when you turn the ball over - it was something like 13 or 14 errors, they had around 60-odd% possession to our 30-odd% – you are always going to be on the wrong end of the scoreboard, no matter how much you want to fight and work hard."It took its toll. That's from the way they played, but also us turning the ball over didn't help. And towards the back-end of the game we were pretty much spent."Leeds Rhinos: Miller, Hall, Newman, Handley, Sivo, Croft, Connor, Oledzki, Levi, Palasia, Hankinson, McDonnell, Watkins.Interchanges: Jenkins, O'Connor, C. Smith, Holroyd, Lumb.Hull KR: Broadbent, Davies, Hiku, Gildart, Booth, Lewis, May, Hadley, Lawton, Amone, Whitbread, Batchelor, Minchella.Interchanges: Martin, Dezaria, Leyland, Pangai Jnr, Hampshire.Sin-bin: Martin (40)Referee: Chris Kendall.

title: York end losing run with victory at Castleford
description: York Knights survive a late scare to secure a fourth Super League win of the season, edging out Castleford Tigers 20-14.
content: Betfred Super LeagueCastleford (10) 14Tries: Valemei 2, Qareqare Goals: WeaverYork (6) 20Tries: Hunter, Field, Nofoaluma, Galeano Goals: Hunter 2York Knights survived a late scare to secure a fourth Super League win of the season, edging out Castleford Tigers 20-14.Semi Valemei put the Tigers in front with an early score, only for Cody Hunter to hit back for the visitors.Jason Qareqare's try meant Cas went into the break in the ascendancy, but second-half scores from Oli Field, David Nofoaluma and Scott Galeano put York in control.Valemei scored again to put the pressure back on York before Qareqare went close in the final minutes, but the Knights held on for their first win in seven matches.Castleford took an early lead when Valemei crossed from close range after Louis Senior knocked down Tom Weaver's searching kick. The latter's conversion was unsuccessful.Hunter spotted a gap to score York's first try of the evening after being released by Paul McShane and he converted from in front of the posts to give the visitors the lead.Moments later, York's Sam Wood was sin-binned for a dangerous tackle on Qareqare.The winger recovered to cross in the left corner with Cas down to 12 men, and this time Weaver converted from the tightest of angles.Down by four points at the interval, York ramped up the pressure early in the second half and it paid off when Field stole past a weak Weaver tackle to make it 10-10.The visitors only grew in confidence and scored again through Nofoaluma after some brilliant work by Nikau Williams in the build-up. Hunter's conversion was good for 16-10.Galeano then scored his ninth try of the season with eight minutes remaining when he beat Qareqare in the air to meet McShane's kick.Valemei hit back immediately for Cas, judging the bounce of a kick perfectly to tap down, but Weaver missed with his conversion attempt.One more converted try would have levelled the scores for the hosts, and Qareqare thought he had it. However, the video referee confirmed no try and awarded a penalty for a high tackle on the winger, as York held on in an agonising climax. 'Schoolboy stuff but not a step backwards' - reactionCastleford boss Ryan Carr: "It was schoolboy stuff."We came here to play the game we wanted to play and were doing it in the first half, winning the battle for field position, but then we don't make kicks, kick it out on the full – schoolboy."It's not a step backwards. We played physically, our effort areas were great but when you have to defend that much in a game, things are going to happen."York head coach Mark Applegarth speaking to BBC Radio York:"It was much needed. We needed a response after last week [against Wigan]."It was back to our DNA, showing up for each other, energy in defence, being nice and patient, playing how we played and taking the chances when they came."Castleford is a difficult place to come. We had to play from minute one to 80 and we showed loads of heart and spirit."We got the monkey off our back every time you have a loss. Hopefully, everyone can relax and we can start to build."Castleford: Laulu-Togagae; Valemei, Senior, Mapapalangi, Qareqare; Asi, Weaver; Dupree, Golding, Lawler, Hirst, Mellor, Stimson.Interchanges: Atoni, Lane, Ross, Brown.York: Mata'afa; Bennison, Galeano, Williams, Nofoaluma; Hunter, McShane; Martin, Inman, Va'a, Wood, Field, Thompson.Interchanges: Balmforth, Vaughan, Hudson, Reynolds.Sin-bin: Wood (20).Referee: Ryan Cox.Sivo spree continues as leaders Leeds maul Hull KR

title: Red Sox place Marcelo Mayer on IL with forearm injury
description: The Boston Red Sox placed infielder Marcelo Mayer on the 10-day injured list because of a left forearm injury Friday.  To take his place, the club recalled infielder Tsung-Che Cheng from Triple-A Worcester before their game against the New York Yankees.  Interim manager Chad Tracy said the 23-year-old Mayer has been dealing soreness for a while.
content: BOSTON (AP) — The Boston Red Sox placed infielder Marcelo Mayer on the 10-day injured list because of a left forearm injury Friday.To take his place, the club recalled infielder Tsung-Che Cheng from Triple-A Worcester before their game against the New York Yankees.Interim manager Chad Tracy said the 23-year-old Mayer has been dealing soreness for a while.“The recommendation of the doctors was if this is something that if you can get off and rest, that would be the best thing to do right now,” Tracy said.The team said it was a “bone stress reaction to the left ulna.”Mayer, the fourth overall pick in the 2021 MLB draft, has struggled this season, batting just .220 with three homers and 22 RBIs.Cheng is making his Red Sox debut, starting at shortstop and batting ninth. He was claimed off waivers from Washington in Feb. after playing with Pittsburgh last season.It’s the third infielder this season that started the year with the club to go on the IL.Shortstop Trevor Story needed sports hernia surgery in May and Isiah Kiner-Falefa also went the IL with a forearm injury last week. ___AP MLB: https://apnews.com/hub/mlb

title: Venezuela quake death toll reaches 920 as interim president vows to save ‘as many as possible’
description: Delcy Rodríguez says foreign rescue teams are arriving as anger grows at official response and limited resourcesSurvivors tell of ‘brutal and fast’ Venezuela quake as hunt for survivors goes onVenezuela’s interim president, Delcy Rodríguez, has vowed to fight to save “as many people as possible” as the official death toll from the country’s worst earthquake in more than a century almost doubled, but frustration was growing at the perceived sluggishness of the government’s response.Rodríguez’s brother, Jorge, the president of the national assembly, said on Friday that the official number of dead had risen to 920. Delcy Rodríguez had earlier said that almost 3,000 people were injured. Speaking during a tour of La Guaira, the most devastated region, she said foreign search and rescue groups were starting to arrive. Continue reading...

title: Iran US Israel war Live Updates: 'Violence Will Be Met With Violence,' Says JD Vance After US Strikes On Sirik
description: Days after US-Iran Switzerland talks, Pakistan on Thursday said that talks between the US and Iran are expected to resume next week. In a statement issued late on Wednesday, Pakistan's foreign office spokesperson Tahir Andrabi said “parties are on the table” and that the process was going on. The US and Iran last week signed a memorandum of understanding aimed at restoring peace in West Asia.Earlier this week, they engaged in technical-level talks in Switzerland's Burgenstock, in the presence of mediators Pakistan, which has signed the memorandum as a “guarantor”, and Qatar, following which they agreed on a roadmap towards a final peace deal in 60 days.“Talks are continuing. I believe that the talks will resume next week, probably on Tuesday... Basically, this is a temporary gap, and it is not as such a break,” Andrabi was quoted as saying in the statement.“Our delegation was there in Burgenstock for the 22nd June talks. I understand that our delegation will also be there when the talks resume next week,” he added.He also said the expected resumption of talks between the US and Iran next week was a "positive development".However, the US and Iran have not yet said anything on the possible resumption of talks.US Central Command (CENTCOM) forces conducted strikes against Iran, June 26, as a powerful response to yesterday’s attack on a commercial ship that was transiting the Strait of Hormuz.US aircraft struck Iranian missile and drone storage locations and coastal radar sites after Iran hit M/V Ever Lovely on June 25 with a one-way attack drone. The Singapore-flagged cargo ship was exiting the Strait of Hormuz along the Omani coast at the time of Iran’s attack.The unwarranted aggression against commercial shipping by Iranian forces clearly violated the ceasefire. Furthermore, Iran’s dangerous behavior undermined freedom of navigation as commerce increasingly flows through the vital international trade corridor.CENTCOM forces continue to provide safe passage coordination and support to commercial vessels transiting the strait. The U.S. military remains present and vigilant to ensure all aspects of the agreement with Iran are adhered to, obeyed, and in full force and effect.
content: Days after US-Iran Switzerland talks, Pakistan on Thursday said that talks between the US and Iran are expected to resume next week. In a statement issued late on Wednesday, Pakistan's foreign office spokesperson Tahir Andrabi said “parties are on the table” and that the process was going on. The US and Iran last week signed a memorandum of understanding aimed at restoring peace in West Asia.Earlier this week, they engaged in technical-level talks in Switzerland's Burgenstock, in the presence of mediators Pakistan, which has signed the memorandum as a “guarantor”, and Qatar, following which they agreed on a roadmap towards a final peace deal in 60 days.“Talks are continuing. I believe that the talks will resume next week, probably on Tuesday... Basically, this is a temporary gap, and it is not as such a break,” Andrabi was quoted as saying in the statement.“Our delegation was there in Burgenstock for the 22nd June talks. I understand that our delegation will also be there when the talks resume next week,” he added.He also said the expected resumption of talks between the US and Iran next week was a "positive development".However, the US and Iran have not yet said anything on the possible resumption of talks.US Central Command (CENTCOM) forces conducted strikes against Iran, June 26, as a powerful response to yesterday’s attack on a commercial ship that was transiting the Strait of Hormuz.US aircraft struck Iranian missile and drone storage locations and coastal radar sites after Iran hit M/V Ever Lovely on June 25 with a one-way attack drone. The Singapore-flagged cargo ship was exiting the Strait of Hormuz along the Omani coast at the time of Iran’s attack.The unwarranted aggression against commercial shipping by Iranian forces clearly violated the ceasefire. Furthermore, Iran’s dangerous behavior undermined freedom of navigation as commerce increasingly flows through the vital international trade corridor.CENTCOM forces continue to provide safe passage coordination and support to commercial vessels transiting the strait. The U.S. military remains present and vigilant to ensure all aspects of the agreement with Iran are adhered to, obeyed, and in full force and effect.

title: Bollywood: ନିରାଶ ନକଲେ ବି ସନ୍ତୁଷ୍ଟ କରିବ ନାହିଁ
description:
ପ୍ରଥମ ଦୃଶ୍ୟରେ ଜନି ଲିଭରଙ୍କ ଚରିତ୍ର ଘୋଷଣା କରିବା ଶୈଳୀରେ ତିନିଥର ‘ୱେଲ୍‌କମ୍’ କହୁଛି। ଏହାର ଅର୍ଥ ମଧ୍ୟ ବୁଝାଇ ଦେଉଛି ଯେ ଏହା ହେଉଛି ‘ୱେଲ୍‌କମ୍’ ଶୃଙ୍ଖଳାର ତୃତୀୟ ଚଳଚ୍ଚିତ୍ର। ତେବେ ପୂର୍ବ ଦୁଇ ‘ୱେଲ୍‌କମ୍’ଠାରୁ ଏହାର ସବୁଠାରୁ ବଡ଼ ଭିନ୍ନତା ହେଉଛନ୍ତି ନିର୍ଦେଶକ। ଅନୀସ ବଜ୍ମି ‘ୱେଲ୍‌କମ୍’ ଓ ‘ୱେଲ୍‌କମ୍ ବ୍ୟାକ୍‌’ର ନିର୍ଦେଶନା ଦେଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ‘ୱେଲ୍‌କମ୍ ଟୁ ଦି ଜଙ୍ଗଲ’ର ନୂଆ ନିର୍ଦେଶକ ହେଉଛନ୍ତି ଅହମଦ ଖାଁ। ସେହିପରି ସଦ୍ୟତମ ‘ୱେଲ୍‌କମ୍’ର କାହାଣୀ ପୂରା ନୂଆ ଏବଂ ଏଥିରେ ମଜନୁ ଭାଇ, ଉଦୟ ଶେଟ୍ଟୀ, ଡକ୍ଟର ଘୁଙ୍ଗୁରୁ ପରି ସ୍ମରଣୀୟ ଚରିତ୍ର ମଧ୍ୟ ଅନୁପସ୍ଥିତ। ପ୍ରଥମ ଚଳଚ୍ଚିତ୍ରର ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଚରିତ୍ରଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ଅକ୍ଷୟ କୁମାର ଓ ପରେଶ ରାଵଲ ହିଁ ଏଥିରେ ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ଅଛନ୍ତି କିନ୍ତୁ ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ଅଲଗା ଚରିତ୍ର ମିଳିଛି। ତେବେ ଅଗଣିତ ତାରକାଙ୍କ ଉପସ୍ଥିତି ସତ୍ତ୍ବେ ଏହା ଦର୍ଶକରେ ପରିପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ପ୍ରେକ୍ଷାଳୟରେ ଯେତିକି ହାସ୍ୟରୋଳ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିବା କଥା ସେଥିରେ ବିଫଳ ହୋଇଛି। ‘ୱେଲ୍‌କମ୍’ ଦେଖି ବଡ଼ ହୋଇଥିବା ଦର୍ଶକଙ୍କୁ ଏହା ନିରାଶ ନ କଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ ସଂପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ସନ୍ତୁଷ୍ଟ କରିବ ନାହିଁ। ଏହି ଚଳଚ୍ଚିତ୍ରର କାହାଣୀ ବଲିଉଡ୍‌ ଶିଳ୍ପକୁ ହିଁ ବିଦ୍ରୂପ କରିବାର ସ୍ବାଗତଯୋଗ୍ୟ ଉଦ୍ୟମ କରିଛି।
Climate: ଉପଗ୍ରହ ଚିତ୍ରରେ ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସିଲା ମୌସୁମୀର ଦୁର୍ବଳ ସ୍ଥିତି
ଏଥିରେ ଜଣେ ଶିଳ୍ପପତି ଆୟକର ଚଢ଼ାଉରୁ ବର୍ତ୍ତିବା ପାଇଁ ୨୦୦୦ କୋଟି ଟଙ୍କା ବଜେଟ୍‌ର ଏକ ଫ୍ଲପ୍‌ ଚଳଚ୍ଚିତ୍ର ନିର୍ମାଣ କରିବାକୁ ନିର୍ଦେଶ ଦେଉଛନ୍ତି। ତେଣୁ ଅନଭିଜ୍ଞ ନିର୍ଦେଶକ ଯୋଡ଼ି ଦେବ (ପରେଶ ରାଵଲ) ଓ ଦାସ (ରାଜପାଲ ଯାଦବ)ଙ୍କୁ ସେ ଚଳଚ୍ଚିତ୍ର ନିର୍ମାଣର ଦାୟିତ୍ବ ମିଳୁଛି। ଆଖିକୁ ଦିଶୁ ନଥିବା ନୈନସୁଖ (ଶ୍ରେୟସ ତଲପଡ଼େ) ସିନେମାଟୋଗ୍ରାଫର୍‌ ସାଜୁଛି। ଚଳଚ୍ଚିତ୍ରର ନାୟକ ହେଉଛି ଜଣେ ବିଫଳ ଭୋଜପୁରୀ ଅଭିନେତା (ଅକ୍ଷୟ କୁମାର) ଏବଂ ପରିବାରବାଦ ସୂତ୍ରରେ ନାୟିକା ସାଜୁଛି ଶିଳ୍ପପତିଙ୍କ ଝିଅ ଜେନି (ଜାକ୍‌ଲିନ୍‌ ଫର୍ଣ୍ଣାଣ୍ଡିଜ୍‌)। ସେମାନେ ନିର୍ମାଣ କରୁଥିବା ଚଳଚ୍ଚିତ୍ରରେ ଭାରତୀୟ ସେନାର ଯବାନମାନେ କାଶ୍ମୀରର ଗୋଟିଏ ଗ୍ରାମର ଅଧିବାସୀଙ୍କୁ ପାକିସ୍ତାନୀ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀଙ୍କଠାରୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରୁଛନ୍ତି। କିନ୍ତୁ ସୁଟିଂ ମଝିରେ ଶିଳ୍ପପତିଙ୍କ ଘରେ ଆୟକର ଚଢ଼ାଉ ହୋଇଯାଉଛି। ତେଣୁ ସେ ଗୋଟିଏ ଦିନରେ ଚଳଚ୍ଚିତ୍ରର ସୁଟିଂ ସାରି ତାହାକୁ ହିଟ୍‌ କରାଇବାକୁ ନିର୍ଦେଶ ଦେଉଛନ୍ତି। ଏହା ପରେ ଚଳଚ୍ଚିତ୍ରର ଅପାରଗ ଟିମ୍‌ ବାସ୍ତବ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀଙ୍କ ସହିତ ମୁହାଁମୁହିଁ ହେବାର ପରିଣତିକୁ ମଜାଳିଆ ଢଙ୍ଗରେ ଦେଖାଇବାର ଉଦ୍ୟମ କରାଯାଇଛି।
Veg Uttapam: ଘରେ ବନାନ୍ତୁ ସ୍ୱାଦିଷ୍ଟ ଭେଜ୍ ଉତ୍ତପମ
ଯାବତୀୟ ହାସ୍ୟ ଅଭିନେତାଙ୍କ ଉପସ୍ଥିତି ସତ୍ତ୍ବେ ଏହି ଚଳଚ୍ଚିତ୍ରର ହସ ଉଦ୍ରେକକାରୀ ଦୃଶ୍ୟଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ଗୋଟିଏ ହାତରେ ଗଣି ହେବ। ଏକା ପ୍ରକାର ପରିସ୍ଥିତି ଓ ସଂଳାପର ପୁରନାବୃତ୍ତି ଯୋଗୁଁ କେତେକ ଦୃଶ୍ୟ ଆଶାଠାରୁ କମ୍ ମଜାଳିଆ ଲାଗିଲା। ଭଲ କଥା ଯେ ଏଥିରେ ଦ୍ବିଅର୍ଥବୋଧକ ଅଶ୍ଳୀଳତା ନାହିଁ। ମଧ୍ୟାନ୍ତର ବେଳେ ଦର୍ଶକଙ୍କୁ ଅକ୍ଷୟଙ୍କ ସିଧାସଳଖ ନିବେଦନ ଅଭିନବ ହୋଇଛି। ତେବେ ଆରମ୍ଭର ୧୫ ମିନିଟ୍‌ରେ ଦୁଇଟି ଆଇଟମ୍‌ ଗୀତ ରଖାଯିବା ଅନାବଶ୍ୟକ ଓ ପ୍ରଭାବହୀନ ଲାଗିଲା। ବୈଷୟିକ ଦୃଷ୍ଟିରୁ ଏହି ଚଳଚ୍ଚିତ୍ର ନେଇ କେତେକ ଅଭିଯୋଗ ଅଛି। ପ୍ରଥମ ହେଲା ଏକାଧିକ ଏଆଇ ଦୃଶ୍ୟର ଉପଯୋଗ, ଯାହା ଦେଖିବାକୁ ଅସୁନ୍ଦର ଲାଗିଥାଏ। ସେହିପରି କିଛି ସ୍ଥାନରେ ଚରିତ୍ରମାନଙ୍କ ଶବ୍ଦ ଉଚ୍ଚାରଣ ସହିତ ଦୃଶ୍ୟ ଖାପ ଖାଉନାହିଁ। ଗୀତଗୁଡ଼ିକ ସ୍ମରଣୀୟ ବୋଲି କହି ହେବ ନାହିଁ। ପରିବାର ସହିତ ହାଲୁକା ମନୋରଂଜନ ପାଇଁ ଏହି ଚଳଚ୍ଚିତ୍ର ଦେଖିବାରେ କୌଣସି ସମସ୍ୟା ନାହିଁ।

title: Heavyweight champion Usyk says vacating heavyweight world title belts
description: Usyk, who had held the WBA, WBC and IBF belts, has been the world undisputed cruiserweight and heavyweight champion.

title: Tennis Pro Caroline Wozniacki on Wimbledon
description: Tennis champion Caroline Wozniacki sat down with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on the sidelines of The Wimbledon Court in Central Park. She discusses the future of the sport, player compensation, and advice for her fellow tennis star Serena Williams re-entering competition.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Military Strikes Iranian Drone, Missile Sites After Cargo Ship Attack In Strait Of Hormuz
description: The US military carried out strikes in the area of the Strait of Hormuz, marking first such operation since Washington and Tehran signed a Memorandum of Understanding.

title: 'Welcome But Be Good:' Trump Posts New US Passport Design Featuring Himself
description: It remains unclear whether the design he posted is the official version or simply a concept that caught his attention.
content: President Donald Trump on Friday unveiled what appears to be a new rendering of a special commemorative US passport featuring his likeness, sharing the design on Truth Social as part of America's 250th anniversary celebrations."The U.S.A.'s New Passport, which says, 'Welcome, but be good!'" Trump wrote in his post.The image he shared included a sample passport page with a large portrait of Trump positioned above the Resolute Desk. The background featured the text of the original Declaration of Independence, while Trump's signature appeared at the bottom of the page. The facing page displayed John Trumbull's famous painting, "The Declaration of Independence."The portrait used in the design appears to be based on Trump's official portrait at the Smithsonian National Portrait Gallery in Washington. It differs from an earlier rendering released by the State Department, which featured a different image of the president.It is not yet clear whether the design Trump posted is the official rendering of the commemorative passport or simply an image that caught his attention. Trump has previously shared unofficial and uncredited renderings on his Truth Social account.The commemorative passport was first announced in April as part of events marking the nation's 250th anniversary. At the time, it was described as "a limited-edition US passport to commemorate the historic occasion of America's 250th anniversary," featuring "custom artwork and enhanced images on the front, back, and inside covers."A State Department official previously told CNN that the commemorative passport would become the default passport issued through the Washington Passport Agency for people renewing their passports in person once it became available. Online renewals and passport applications processed at other locations will continue using the existing passport design.The current US passport features Percy Moran's painting of Francis Scott Key on the inside front cover, along with lines from the US national anthem inspired by the Battle of Fort McHenry.

title: Hellman & Friedman-Backed Hub Files Confidentially for IPO
description: Hub International Holdings Inc., an insurance broker backed by Hellman & Friedman, confidentially filed for an initial public offering whose proceeds could be used by the to pare its debt.

A Single Mother, African Immigrant, Injuries: How Ousmane Dembélé Became The World's Best Against All Odds
description: Ousmane Dembele's rise to a Ballon d'Or, who is now a two-time Champions League winner and also among a rare list of players to score a World Cup hat-trick
content: Ousmane Dembele's phenomenal redemption continued as he scored the second quickest hat trick in FIFA World Cup history against Norway as France won their final group stage match in the 2026 edition in Boston. This marked a new chapter in the PSG star's incredible career, who managed to translate his incredible club form to the international level.Coming into this tournament, the 28-year-old had never scored a goal in a major international tournament (World Cup or Euros). With a goal against Iraq earlier this week, he got the monkey off his back and built on the momentum with today's historic display. The long-awaited success at the international level comes after his record-breaking display at the club level. He won the Ballon d'Or last year after playing a key role in PSG winning the treble and securing the first-ever Champions League title. The Frenchman was also the star of the show as Luis Enrique's men defended their title and became only the second team in the Champions League era to win Europe's most prestigious club competition  twice in a Real Madrid trophy.A Talent Fulfils His Potential For those who saw Dembele play football in his teens and when he burst on the scene, his success will not come as a surprise. As an ambidextrous footballer, his abilities are unmatched, and if one measures raw talent, there are few as good as him. There was a reason that even before he signed his first professional contract at Rennes, the biggest clubs in Europe had their eyes on him. However, given what happened before and after in Dembele's life, it will be hard for anyone to imagine him getting here. It is a truly a story of a player beating the odds in life and becoming football's biggest star.Ousmane Dembele Shines Against All OddsDembele's roots hail from Africa, and his parents migrated to France in search of better chances in the Normandy town of Vernon. His father, Ousmane Sr., is from Mali, while his mother, Fatima, is of Mauritanian-Senegalese descent and comes from a town called Waly Diantang, which has less than 20,000 inhabitants. Ousmane Sr. left the family home, which left Fatima with the job of raising three young children. She gave Dembele support in his footballing journey by taking him to training every day while also offering odds to support their financial needs. It was a trip to Rennis when Dembele was just six to meet her uncle Badou Sambagué (a former footballer from Mali) that proved key in his football career. While Dembélé became a star, Fatima was central to his decision of delaying a transfer away and signing his professional contract at Rennes. Later, he moved to Borussia Dortmund in 2016 before a stunning £135.5 million move to Barcelona in the aftermath of Neymar leaving the club for PSG in a world-record deal.The Fall And Rise Of Ousman DembeleThe move to Barcelona for a fee as big as that meant that Dembele's potential was set to get a big stage with Lionel Messi as his teammate. However, things did not work out at the Catalan club for the Frenchman, as he spent six years at Nou Camp but missed 754 days of action and suffered 15 injuries. Although Dembele was part of France's 2018 World Cup-winning team, his contribution was negligible. Overall, he played 185 matches for Barcelona and scored just 40 goals With the fitness issues showing no sign of improving, it appeared that Dembele's career was headed as a case of a talent that failed to reach its potential before a transfer to PSG in 2023 for £43.5 million sparked a turnaround. Interestingly, Neymar left the club in the same transfer window. He is the talisman of Luis Enrique' history-making team, and the Ballon d'Or victory last year signified an incredible moment as a player hit the highest point a footballer can get to from a stage where it appeared everything was staked against him. The story only seems to be getting better, and the rare feat of being a multiple Ballon d'Or winner is appearing increasingly likely.

title: Ply shop caught fire: ସର୍ଟ ସର୍କିଟ ଯୋଗୁ ଜଳିଗଲା ପ୍ଲାଏ ଦୋକାନ, ଲକ୍ଷାଧିକ ଟଙ୍କାର ସାମଗ୍ରୀ ନଷ୍ଟ
description:
କୁଜଙ୍ଗ: କୁଜଙ୍ଗ ଥାନା ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ବଳରାମପୁର ଗୋଡା ନିକଟରେ ଗତ ରାତି ପ୍ରାୟ ୧୦:୩୦ ସମୟରେ ଏକ ଭୟାବହ ଅଗ୍ନିକାଣ୍ଡ ଘଟିଯାଇଛି। ସର୍ଟ ସର୍କିଟ ଯୋଗୁ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ‘ପୂଜା ଏଣ୍ଟରପ୍ରାଇଜେସ’ ନାମକ ଏକ ଆଲୁମିନିୟମ ଓ ପ୍ଲାଏ ଦୋକାନରେ ନିଆଁ ଲାଗିଯାଇଥିଲା। ଦୋକାନଟିରେ ବିପୁଳ ପରିମାଣର ପ୍ଲାଏଉଡ୍ ଏବଂ ଆଲୁମିନିୟମ ସାମଗ୍ରୀ ଭରପୂର ଥିବାରୁ ନିଆଁ ଖୁବ୍ ଶୀଘ୍ର ଉଗ୍ର ରୂପ ଧାରଣ କରିଥିଲା।
ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷଦର୍ଶୀମାନେ ଦୋକାନରୁ ଧୂଆଁ ଓ ନିଆଁ ବାହାରୁଥିବା ଦେଖି ତୁରନ୍ତ ଅଗ୍ନିଶମ ବାହିନୀକୁ ଖବର ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ଦୋକାନ ଭିତରେ ତିନୋଟି ଗ୍ୟାସ ସିଲିଣ୍ଡର ରହିଥିବାରୁ ନିଆଁର ପ୍ରକୋପ ଅଧିକ ବ୍ୟାପକ ହୋଇଯାଇଥିଲା। ଅଗ୍ନିଶମ କର୍ମଚାରୀମାନେ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ନିଆଁକୁ ଆୟତ୍ତ କରିବାକୁ ପ୍ରାଣପଣେ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରିଥିଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ ସେତେବେଳକୁ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଦୋକାନଟି ଜଳି ପୋଡ଼ି ଛାରଖାର ହୋଇଯାଇଥିଲା।
ଏହି ଅଗ୍ନିକାଣ୍ଡରେ ଲକ୍ଷାଧିକ ଟଙ୍କାର ସମ୍ପତ୍ତି ନଷ୍ଟ ହୋଇଥିବା ଆଶଙ୍କା କରାଯାଉଛି। ଦୋକାନର ମାଲିକ ତିର୍ତ୍ତୋଲ ଅଞ୍ଚଳର ହୋଇଥିବା ବେଳେ, ସେ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ଖବର ପାଇ ତୁରନ୍ତ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଥିଲେ। ପ୍ରାଥମିକ ତଦନ୍ତରୁ ଏହି ଅଗ୍ନିକାଣ୍ଡ ବୈଦ୍ୟୁତିକ ସର୍ଟ ସର୍କିଟ ଯୋଗୁଁ ହିଁ ଘଟିଥିବା ଅନୁମାନ କରାଯାଉଛି। ଏହି ଘଟଣା ପରେ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଚାଞ୍ଚଲ୍ୟ ଖେଳିଯାଇଛି।

title: Ghana's Antoine Semenyo urges teammates to be more aggressive with World Cup refs over VAR

title: रात के इस समय भूलकर भी न चलाएं तेज रफ्तार गाड़ी, पड़ सकता है भारी, रिपोर्ट में हुआ बड़ा खुलासा
description: Night Driving Tips: भारत में तेजी से बढ़ती गाड़ियों की संख्या के साथ सड़क हादसों के मामले भी लगातार बढ़ रहे हैं। देखा गया है कि हर दिन हजारों लोग सड़क दुर्घटनाओं का शिकार होते हैं।
content:
Night Driving Alert: भारत में तेजी से बढ़ती गाड़ियों की संख्या के साथ सड़क हादसों के मामले भी लगातार बढ़ रहे हैं। देखा गया है कि हर दिन हजारों लोग सड़क दुर्घटनाओं का शिकार होते हैं। इसी बीच सामने आई एक रोड सेफ्टी रिपोर्ट ने चौंकाने वाला खुलासा किया है। इस रिपोर्ट में बताया गया है कि देर रात का समय सड़क हादसों के लिहाज से सबसे ज्यादा खतरनाक माना जाता है। वहीं हैरानी की बात यह है कि इस दौरान सड़कों पर ट्रैफिक अपेक्षाकृत कम होता है फिर भी दुर्घटनाओं की संख्या बढ़ जाती है।
खाली सड़क भी बन सकती है खतरे की वजह
बता दें कि आमतौर पर लोगों को लगता है कि रात में कम ट्रैफिक होने के कारण ड्राइविंग ज्यादा सुरक्षित होती है लेकिन वास्तविकता इससे बिल्कुल अलग है। इसको लेकर विशेषज्ञों कहते है कि लंबी दूरी तय करने के बाद ड्राइवर थकान महसूस करने लगता है और कई बार हल्की नींद भी आने लगती है। ऐसे में कुछ सेकंड की लापरवाही भी बड़े हादसे का कारण बन सकती है। इसके अलावा खाली सड़क देखकर कई लोग गाड़ी की रफ्तार बढ़ा देते हैं जिससे वाहन पर नियंत्रण खोने का खतरा बढ़ जाता है।
आखिर क्यों बढ़ जाते हैं हादसे?
रात के समय सड़कों पर रोशनी कम होने से विजिबिलिटी प्रभावित होती है। कई हाईवे और ग्रामीण इलाकों में पर्याप्त स्ट्रीट लाइट नहीं होती जिससे सामने आने वाले वाहन, जानवर या सड़क पर मौजूद अन्य बाधाएं समय रहते दिखाई नहीं देतीं। इसके साथ ही रात में भारी वाहन जैसे ट्रक और कंटेनर भी अधिक संख्या में चलते हैं। तेज रफ्तार, कम रोशनी और ड्राइवर की थकान मिलकर दुर्घटना की आशंका को कई गुना बढ़ा देती है। यही वजह है कि कम ट्रैफिक होने के बावजूद रात में सड़क हादसे ज्यादा दर्ज किए जाते हैं।
ये भी पढ़े:  दुनिया की पहली Hydrogen Narrow-Gauge Train लॉन्च, न धुआं, न प्रदूषण सिर्फ पानी की भाप
रात में सफर कर रहे हैं तो इन बातों का रखें ध्यान
अगर आपको रात में लंबी दूरी तय करनी है तो यात्रा शुरू करने से पहले पूरी नींद जरूर लें। लगातार कई घंटे ड्राइव करने से बचें और बीच-बीच में ब्रेक लेकर शरीर को आराम दें। यदि ड्राइविंग के दौरान नींद महसूस होने लगे तो तुरंत सुरक्षित स्थान पर वाहन रोककर आराम करें। इसके अलावा हमेशा निर्धारित गति सीमा का पालन करें, हेडलाइट्स का सही तरीके से इस्तेमाल करें और सीट बेल्ट लगाना कभी न भूलें।

title: Iran Warns of 'Swift and Decisive' Response After US Strikes, Then Pulls Statement
description: On Friday, Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps vowed a "swift and decisive" response after the U.S. military struck Iranian targets near the Strait of Hormuz, but some time later, Iranian state media removed the statement without an explanation.
content: Tensions in the Strait of Hormuz are flaring up again, just days after a MoU was supposed to bring an end to hostilities between the United States and Iran. Now, Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps is vowing to respond after the U.S. launched strikes on Iranian targets.According to a report from Al Jazeera, the IRGC released a statement, shared through Iran's ISNA news agency, claiming that its naval and air forces "succeeded in neutralising" a U.S. attack carried out on Sirik island.The statement didn't stop there. The IRGC made clear that it considers the strike an act of aggression that will be met with consequences. "We emphasise that this aggression will not go unanswered, and our response will be swift and decisive at a time and place of our choosing," the statement read. The IRGC added a warning as well, stating that "any new foolishness will be met with a harsh response."A Strange TwistIn a follow up update, Al Jazeera reported that Iranian state media, some time later, removed the purported IRGC statement regarding the U.S. attack. The reason behind the removal wasn't explained, and it remains unclear whether this reflects a retraction, an editing decision, or something else entirely.Meanwhile, U.S. Vice President released a statement on X that read - "Iran signed a ceasefire agreement. We have honored it. If they have disagreements about how the MOU is being applied, they can pick up the phone. But violence will be met with violence." On the Iranian side, Ebrahim Azizi, head of the Iranian parliament’s national security committee, reacting to the U.S. attack, wrote on X that "The U.S. attacked Iran in the middle of negotiations once again. The failed U.S. President has shown he has no commitment to the principles of negotiation or a ceasefire." "This reckless violation of the ceasefire will, as always, lead to retreat and regret on their part. The blame game does not work anymore," he added. What Led to the U.S. StrikesOn June 26th, U.S. military carried out strikes against Iranian targets near the Strait of Hormuz, and U.S. Central Command confirmed the operation in an official statement. This marks the first time the U.S. has struck Iranian targets since both countries signed a memorandum of understanding last week that was meant to formally end the war.    https://t.co/W4zjNqnmCt— U.S. Central Command (@CENTCOM) June 26, 2026 The chain of events started on Thursday, when Iran launched drone attacks targeting several commercial ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz, as per a report from Axios. One of those drones struck a Singapore-flagged cargo ship called the Ever Lovely as it was exiting the strait near the Omani coast. CENTCOM described the American military response that followed as a "powerful response."President Trump weighed in as well, writing on Truth Social Friday that Iran's attack on commercial shipping was "a foolish violation of our Ceasefire Agreement."What the U.S. Actually HitCENTCOM detailed exactly what U.S. military targeted during the strikes: Iranian missile and drone storage locations, along with coastal radar sites positioned around the strait.CENTCOM emphasized that protecting commercial shipping remains a top priority going forward. "CENTCOM forces continue to provide safe passage coordination and support to commercial vessels transiting the strait. The U.S. military remains present and vigilant to ensure all aspects of the agreement with Iran are adhered to, obeyed, and in full force and effect," the command said in a statement. It remains to be seen whether Iran does launch retaliatory strikes and what impact that has on the U.S.-Iran deal.

title: कानूनी खामियों को दूर करने के लिए NDPS कानून में संशोधन करेगी सरकार : अमित शाह
description:
नई दिल्ली : केंद्रीय गृह मंत्री अमित शाह ने शुक्रवार को कहा कि केंद्र सरकार उन सभी कानूनी खामियों को दूर करने के लिए स्वापक औषधि और मन:प्रभावी पदार्थ अधिनियम (एनडीपीएस) में संशोधन करेगी जिनका इस्तेमाल मादक पदार्थ तस्करी गिरोहों द्वारा किया जाता है। शाह ने मादक पदार्थ तस्करों और आपूर्तिकर्त्ताओं के प्रति सख्त रुख.
The post कानूनी खामियों को दूर करने के लिए NDPS कानून में संशोधन करेगी सरकार : अमित शाह appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
नई दिल्ली : केंद्रीय गृह मंत्री अमित शाह ने शुक्रवार को कहा कि केंद्र सरकार उन सभी कानूनी खामियों को दूर करने के लिए स्वापक औषधि और मन:प्रभावी पदार्थ अधिनियम (एनडीपीएस) में संशोधन करेगी जिनका इस्तेमाल मादक पदार्थ तस्करी गिरोहों द्वारा किया जाता है। शाह ने मादक पदार्थ तस्करों और आपूर्तिकर्त्ताओं के प्रति सख्त रुख अपनाने की आवश्यकता पर भी जोर दिया।
शाह ने शुक्रवार को राष्ट्रीय नार्को-समन्वय केंद्र (एनसीओआरडी) की 10वीं शीर्षस्तरीय बैठक को संबोधित करते हुए राज्यों से कहा कि वित्त मंत्रालय द्वारा प्रस्तावित संशोधनों के संबंध में अपने सुझाव केंद्र सरकार को भेजें, ताकि मौजूदा खामियों को प्रभावी ढंग से दूर किया जा सके।
गृह मंत्री ने देश में मादक पदार्थ की समस्या से निपटने में एजैंसियों द्वारा हासिल की गई ‘सफलताओं’ का भी उल्लेख किया। उन्होंने कहा, वर्ष 2004 से 2014 के बीच 26 लाख किलोग्राम सिंथैटिक मादक पदार्थ जब्त किए गए थे। इसके विपरीत, वर्ष 2014 से 2026 के बीच हमने 1.18 करोड़ किलोग्राम सिंथैटिक मादक पदार्थ जब्त किए हैं। इससे स्पष्ट है कि हमारा अभियान लगातार सफलता की ओर बढ़ रहा है। शाह ने कहा कि वर्ष 2004 से 2014 के बीच जब्त किए गए मादक पदार्थों का मूल्य लगभग 40,000 करोड़ रुपए था, जबकि वर्ष 2014 से 2026 के बीच जब्त किए गए मादक पदार्थों का मूल्य लगभग 1.84 लाख करोड़ रुपए है।
उन्होंने कहा कि यह सरकार की कार्रवाई की प्रभावशीलता और दायरे में उल्लेखनीय वृद्धि को दर्शाता है। गृह मंत्री ने कहा कि सरकार उन सभी कमियों को दूर करने के लिए एनडीपीएस अधिनियम में संशोधन करेगी जिनका इस्तेमाल मादक पदार्थ तस्करी गिरोहों द्वारा किया जा रहा है। उन्होंने राज्यों से वित्त मंत्रालय द्वारा प्रस्तावित संशोधनों पर अपने सुझाव केंद्र के साथ साझा करने का आग्रह किया। शाह ने राज्य सरकारों से हर परिस्थिति में वास्तविक समय में सूचना साझा करना सुनिश्चित करने को भी कहा। उन्होंने कहा, इसके लिए नारकोटिक्स कंट्रोल ब्यूरो ने कई पोर्टल विकसित किए हैं।
मैं सभी मुख्य सचिवों और पुलिस प्रमुखों से आग्रह करता हूं कि वे अपने-अपने राज्यों से संबंधित अपराधों का विवरण निर्धारित समयसीमा के भीतर इन पोर्टल पर अपलोड करें। इससे भारत सरकार को इन मामलों की समीक्षा करने और आवश्यक सुझाव तथा प्रतिक्रिया देने में सहायता मिलेगी। उन्होंने सभी मुख्य सचिवों और पुलिस प्रमुखों से एनसीओआरडी बैठकों को परिणामोन्मुख बनाने की दिशा में आगे बढ़ने का आह्वान किया।
शाह ने कहा, बैठकों की संख्या निश्चित रूप से बढ़ रही है, लेकिन यह भी आवश्यक है कि वे परिणामोन्मुख हों। उन्होंने कहा, क्या बैठकों में लिए गए निर्णयों का प्रभावी क्रियान्वयन हो रहा है? क्या अगली बैठक में उन निर्णयों की समीक्षा की जाती है? क्या उनका गंभीर और कठोर विश्लेषण किया जाता है? बैठकों को परिणामोन्मुख बनाने की दिशा में राज्यों द्वारा किए गए प्रयास ही हमें सफलता तक पहुंचा सकते हैं।
The post कानूनी खामियों को दूर करने के लिए NDPS कानून में संशोधन करेगी सरकार : अमित शाह appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: Donald Trump Thanks India After Hyderabad Renames Road 'Trump Avenue' in His Honour
description: US President Donald Trump expressed gratitude after a road in Hyderabad was renamed Donald Trump Avenue, marking a historic recognition as the first American president to receive such an honor.
content: US President Donald Trump has thanked India after a road near the US Consulate in Hyderabad was officially renamed Donald Trump Avenue, calling it a historic honour and saying he is the first American president to receive such recognition.Taking to Truth Social on Friday, Trump shared his appreciation, writing: "The new Donald Trump Avenue in Hyderabad, India — The first US President to ever be honored in this way. Thank you! President DONALD J TRUMP."The road, located in Hyderabad's Financial District, was renamed by the Telangana government as part of the Freedom 250 celebrations commemorating the 250th anniversary of American independence.The newly installed ceremonial plaque was unveiled during an official event attended by Telangana Deputy Chief Minister Bhatti Vikramarka, US Ambassador to India Sergio Gor, and US Consul General in Hyderabad Laura Williams. Senior government officials, diplomats and industry leaders were also present at the ceremony.The decision to rename the road was first announced by Telangana Chief Minister A. Revanth Reddy in December 2025.According to state officials, the move reflects the growing strategic and economic partnership between Telangana and the United States. Hyderabad has become one of India's leading destinations for American technology companies, multinational corporations and global capability centres, strengthening business and investment ties between the two sides.The renaming is part of a broader series of initiatives organised under the Freedom 250 celebrations, highlighting the longstanding relationship between India and the United States.

Commissionerate Police: କମିସନରେଟ୍‌ ପୁଲିସ ହାତରେ ଚାଞ୍ଚଲ୍ୟକର ତଥ୍ୟ: ଜେଲ୍ ସିସି କ୍ୟାମେରା ଫୁଟେଜ୍‌, ଦସ୍ତାବିଜ ଗାଏବ
description:
କଟକ: ଚୌଦ୍ବାର ସର୍କଲ ଜେଲ୍‌ରୁ ଦୁଇ ବିହାରୀ ଅପରାଧୀ ଫେରାର ଘଟଣାରେ ରାଜ୍ୟସଭା ସାଂସଦ ସୁଜିତ କୁମାରଙ୍କ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଜେଲ୍ ଡିଜି ସୁଶାନ୍ତ କୁମାର ନାଥ ଓ ଚୌଦ୍ବାର ସର୍କଲ ଜେଲ୍‌ ବରିଷ୍ଠ ଅଧୀକ୍ଷକ ସୁଜିତ କୁମାର ରାଉଳଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧରେ ଥାନାରେ ଏତଲା ପରେ ଜେଲ୍ ବିଭାଗରେ କମ୍ପନ ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଛି। ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଚୌଦ୍ବାର ଜେଲ୍‌ ଅଧୀକ୍ଷକଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧରେ ରୁଜୁ ମାମଲା ଆଧାରରେ ପୁଲିସ ଯେଉଁ ଦସ୍ତାବିଜ ଥାନାରେ ଦାଖଲ କରିବାକୁ ଶ୍ରୀ ରାଉଳଙ୍କୁ କହିଥିଲା କୌଣସି ଗୋଟିଏ ବି ଦସ୍ତାବିଜ ଦାଖଲ କରିନାହାନ୍ତି। ୬ଥର ପୁଲିସ ରିମାଇଣ୍ଡର୍‌ ଦେବା ପରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଶ୍ରୀ ରାଉଳ ଦୁଇ ବିହାରୀ ଅପରାଧୀ ଫେରାର ଘଟଣାର ପୂର୍ବ ଓ ପରର ସିସି କ୍ୟାମେରା ଫୁଟେଜ୍‌ ସମେତ ଜେଲ୍ ଦସ୍ତାବିଜ ଦାଖଲ କରିନାହାନ୍ତି। କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ଭୟରେ ସେ ଏ ସବୁ ଗାଏବ କରିଦେଇଥିବା ଚୌଦ୍ବାର ପୁଲିସ ସନ୍ଦେହ କରୁଛି।
MoU: ଆଇଏମ୍‌ବି-ଏନ୍‌ଆଇଏସ୍‌ଏମ୍‌ ଏଲ୍‌ଓୟୁ ସ୍ବାକ୍ଷର
ଫସିଯିବେ ଜେଲ୍ ଡିଜି, ଅଧୀକ୍ଷକ!୬ ଥର ଚିଠି ପରେ ବି ଧରାଛୁଆଁ ଦେଲେନି ଅଧୀକ୍ଷକସାଂସଦ ସୁଜିତଙ୍କ ଏତଲା ଉପରେ ପୁଲିସର ଷ୍ଟେସନ୍‌ ଡାଏରି
ରାଜ୍ୟସଭା ସାଂସଦ ସୁଜିତ କୁମାର ଜେଲ୍ ଡିଜି ଓ ଅଧୀକ୍ଷକ ଶ୍ରୀ ରାଉଳଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧରେ ଚୌଦ୍ବାର ଥାନା ଆଇଆଇସିଙ୍କୁ ଇ-ମେଲ୍‌ ଯୋଗେ ପଠାଇଥିବା ଏତଲା ଆଧାରରେ ପୁଲିସ ଏକ ଷ୍ଟେସନ୍‌ ଡାଏରି କରିଛି। ସାଂସଦ ସୁଜିତ କୁମାରଙ୍କ ସହିତ ପୁଲିସ ଯୋଗାଯୋଗରେ ଥିବାବେଳେ ଖୁବ୍‌ଶୀଘ୍ର ମାମଲା ରୁଜୁ ନେଇ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରାଯିବ। ଅନ୍ୟପଟେ ଦୁଇ ଦୁର୍ଦ୍ଦାନ୍ତ ବିହାରୀ ଅପରାଧୀ ରାଜା ସାହାଣୀ ଓ ମଧୁକାନ୍ତ କୁମାର ଚୌଦ୍ବାର ସର୍କଲ ଜେଲ୍‌ରୁ ଫେରାର ଘଟଣାକୁ ନେଇ ଜେଲ୍‌ର ବରିଷ୍ଠ ଜେଲ୍ ଅଧୀକ୍ଷକ ଶ୍ରୀ ରାଉଳଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧରେ ସରକାରୀ ଦସ୍ତାବିଜ ଜାଲିଆତି କରିବା ନେଇ ତତ୍କାଳୀନ ଜେଲର୍‌ ସନ୍ତୋଷିନୀ ଦାଶ ଚୌଦ୍ବାର ଥାନାରେ ଲିଖିତ ଅଭିଯୋଗ କରିଥିଲେ। ୨୦୨୫, ଅକ୍ଟୋବର ୧, ୨ ଓ ୩ ତାରିଖର ଜେଲ୍‌ ଗେଟ୍‌ ପ୍ରବେଶ-ପ୍ରସ୍ଥାନ ରେଜିଷ୍ଟର୍‌ରେ ଉ‌ଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟମୂଳକ ଭାବେ ଜାଲିଆତି କରାଯାଇଛି। ଶ୍ରୀ ରାଉଳ ସେହି ଦୁଇଦିନ ଜେଲ୍‌ରେ ଲଗାତାର ଡ୍ୟୁଟି କରିଥିଲେ ବୋଲି ଦର୍ଶାଇବା ପାଇଁ ଏଭଳି ଜାଲିଆତି କରାଯାଇଛି।
Climate: ଉପଗ୍ରହ ଚିତ୍ରରେ ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସିଲା ମୌସୁମୀର ଦୁର୍ବଳ ସ୍ଥିତି
ଅକ୍ଟୋବର ୨ ତାରିଖରେ ଶ୍ରୀ ରାଉଳ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ ଖାତାରେ ନିଜ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟରେ ଖୋର୍ଦ୍ଧା ଯାଉଥିବା ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ଉଲ୍ଲେଖ କରିଥିଲେ। କିନ୍ତୁ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ସମୟରେ ଜେଲ୍‌ ପ୍ରବେଶ-ପ୍ରସ୍ଥାନ ଖାତାରେ ଜାଲିଆତି କରି ସେହି ଦିନ ସେ ଜେଲ୍‌ ଭିତରେ ପୂରା ଡ୍ୟୁଟି କରିଛନ୍ତି ବୋଲି ଦର୍ଶାଇବାକୁ ଉଦ୍ୟମ କରିଥିଲେ। ଅଧୀକ୍ଷକ ଶ୍ରୀ ରାଉଳ ଜେଲର୍‌ ଶ୍ରୀମତୀ ଦାଶଙ୍କ ଜେଲ୍‌ ରେକର୍ଡରେ ଦସ୍ତଖତ ଜାଲିଆତି କରି ତାଙ୍କୁ ଫସାଇବାକୁ ଉଦ୍ୟମ କରିଛନ୍ତି ବୋଲି ମଧ୍ୟ ଶ୍ରୀମତୀ ଦାଶ ଅଭିଯୋଗରେ ଉଲ୍ଲେଖ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ତଥ୍ୟ ଥାନାରେ ଦାଖଲ କରିବାକୁ ଜେଲ୍‌ର ବରିଷ୍ଠ ଅଧୀକ୍ଷକ ତଥା ଜାଲିଆତି ମାମଲାର ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତଙ୍କୁ ପୁଲିସ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ ଦେଇଥିଲା। ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ସୁଦ୍ଧା ୬ ଥର ଚୌଦ୍ବାର ଥାନା ପୁଲିସ ରିମାଇଣ୍ଡର ସତ୍ତ୍ବେ ଅଧୀକ୍ଷକ ଶ୍ରୀ ରାଉଳ ମିନିଟ୍ ବୁକ୍‌, ଗେଟ୍‌ ପ୍ରବେଶ ଓ ପ୍ରସ୍ଥାନ ରେଜିଷ୍ଟର, ୨୦୨୫ ଅକ୍ଟୋବର ୧ରୁ ୩ ତାରିଖ ଯାଏଁ ସିସି କ୍ୟାମେରା ଫୁଟେଜ୍‌, ନାଇଟ୍ ରାଉଣ୍ଡ ରେଜିଷ୍ଟର୍‌, ୨୦୨୫ ଅକ୍ଟୋବରର ଲକ୍‌ଅପ୍ ରେଜିଷ୍ଟର୍‌, ଦିନରାତି ରାଉଣ୍ଡ ରେଜିଷ୍ଟର୍‌ ପୁଲିସ ନିକଟରେ ଦାଖଲ କରୁନାହାନ୍ତି। ଏହା ପରେ ଜେଲ୍ ଅଧୀକ୍ଷକଙ୍କୁ ଜେଲ୍ ଡିଜି ସୁଶାନ୍ତ ନାଥ ଏକପ୍ରକାର ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଦେଉଥିବା ଚର୍ଚ୍ଚା ବଢ଼ିବାରେ ଲାଗିଛି।

title:
